principles.opus: Design decisions, architecture, security review, RLS posture, payment flow design, complex investigation. Anything where a wrong answer creates permanent damage.
principles.sonnet: Execution against a clear spec, refactoring, UI work, test scaffolding, docs, release checks, mechanical migrations.
principles.haiku: Status reporting, file listings, diff summaries, simple yes/no checks. Use sparingly — Sonnet handles most execution well.
